question: What do the functions of Main Menu and Browser History of the eReader can do?
content:
Main Menu shows all device features, including Browser History, e Book, Music, Video, Photo, Record, Explorer, and Settings; select the desired function and enter it.<PIC>
Browser History displays recently browsed files. Use the Navigation keys to select a book and press M to open it at the last page you read. If a recently read Micro SD file is deleted, its record remains in Browser History but it cannot be opened.<PIC>
ret: "Main Menu shows all device features, including Browser History, e Book, Music, Video, Photo, Record, Explorer, and Settings; select the desired function and enter it.<PIC>\nBrowser History displays recently browsed files. Use the Navigation keys to select a book and press M to open it at the last page you read. If a recently read Micro SD file is deleted, its record remains in Browser History but it cannot be opened.<PIC>",["Manual13_3", "Manual13_4"]
notes: Grounded in the Color E-Reader Main Menu and Browser History sections. Images are adjacent UI illustrations for the two explained functions.
